February 2026

Flooding? No problem!

Our Instructor Arrives in Style: Maputo to Bilene by Cessna!

This season, our instructor made his way to Bilene from Maputo… aboard a small Cessna! An arrival that perfectly reflects the spirit of adventure and passion that drives the entire Bilenekite team.

A flight over Mozambique's breathtaking landscapes, between turquoise lagoons and wild lands, to land right on our kite spot. Because here, even the journey is part of the experience!

Ready to experience thrills (and chill) yourself? Join us for unforgettable sessions, on land and in the air!

Pierrot's video

See you on the water!
